chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3636 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of MA 20346/2016 3. For hearing of main case 13.10.2020 Mr. Noor Ahmed Memon, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, A.A.G. ----- This is a harassment petition filed by the petitioner Abdullah Shah Ghazi Sugar Mills Ltd. on the ground that no coercive action be taken. Alongwith this petition a notice of personal hearing is attached. However, the only contention raised by the petitioner’s counsel is that they have been asked to shutdown the factory without any written order. These questions would require thorough probe which is not possible in proceedings under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. However, it is expected that officials shall pass order in accordance with law after hearing the petitioner. The petitioner is not able to satisfy this court that an unlawful action is being taken by the respondents while issuing notice of personal hearing. The petition is accordingly dismissed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
